query:
UPDATE musicVideoScenes SET mvSceneStatus = 'failed', errorMessage = 'Atlas Cloud timeout — auto-failed by reaper', taskId = NULL, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE id IN (510043, 510071);

UPDATE providerJobLogs SET jobStatus = 'cancelled', updatedAt = NOW() WHERE sceneId IN (510043, 510071) AND jobStatus IN ('submitted', 'pending');
